creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
After the last update www/owncloudclient segfault while after being started.

Apparently, I cannot attach the core dumped file due to size, so:

http://www.mediafire.com/file/yavm21axc97k06y/owncloud.core

However, the important part part should be this:


#0  strlen (str=0x42b042c04120416 <Address 0x42b042c04120416 out of bounds>)
    at /usr/src/lib/libc/string/strlen.c:100
100		va = (*lp - mask01);
[New Thread 81d75d800 (LWP 101946/<unknown>)]
[New Thread 815a75e00 (LWP 101945/<unknown>)]
[New Thread 8128aa000 (LWP 101944/<unknown>)]
[New Thread 80c81a100 (LWP 100363/<unknown>)]
[New Thread 80c816000 (LWP 101687/<unknown>)]


Thank you.
